## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off the new development cycle for the Client Ops Engineering team, discussing priorities and assigning tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/qW1ynHi6Pf1kwDHh8DWyDVEjPqbVkKF_?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on client-side needs, including document storage, localized SEO, and content enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/qW1ynHi6Pf1kwDHh8DWyDVEjPqbVkKF_?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Prioritize tasks for Biologica, InnerWell, Airbyte, and image generation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/qW1ynHi6Pf1kwDHh8DWyDVEjPqbVkKF_?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Implement Google Search Console integration for improved SEO and reporting capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/qW1ynHi6Pf1kwDHh8DWyDVEjPqbVkKF_?tab=summary&timestamp=2273.0)
  - [Address ongoing client requests and bug fixes while balancing new feature development](https://fathom.video/share/qW1ynHi6Pf1kwDHh8DWyDVEjPqbVkKF_?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

## Topics

### Client Priorities

  - [Biologica: Research and implement document storage for medical content creation](https://fathom.video/share/qW1ynHi6Pf1kwDHh8DWyDVEjPqbVkKF_?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [InnerWell: Develop location-based content generation for localized SEO](https://fathom.video/share/qW1ynHi6Pf1kwDHh8DWyDVEjPqbVkKF_?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [Airbyte: Enrich 2,600 legacy pages and implement Webflow publishing integration](https://fathom.video/share/qW1ynHi6Pf1kwDHh8DWyDVEjPqbVkKF_?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
  - [Multiple clients: Create image generation workflows for content and cover images](https://fathom.video/share/qW1ynHi6Pf1kwDHh8DWyDVEjPqbVkKF_?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)

### Workflow Improvements
